attacking_style: Opportunistic late-race attacks from breakaway positions, capable of holding off peloton surges inside final kilometer. Exploits tactical situations rather than predetermined attack points.
team_tactics: Dual-role flexibility: capable of full domestique duties for team leaders (Vingegaard) while opportunistically pursuing personal results when tactical situation permits. Team adjusts strategy based on his intermediate sprint positioning.
terrain_preference: Excels in breakaway scenarios on mixed terrain where power and tactical awareness matter more than pure climbing. Strong enough to bridge gaps and hold off reduced pelotons in finale.
vulnerability: Role conflict between personal ambitions and domestique duties can force energy conservation choices. Must choose between intermediate sprint points and team support responsibilities.
key_patterns: Toggles between personal ambition and team domestique role based on race situation
Uses intermediate sprints strategically to secure classifications early, enabling role flexibility
Thrives in late breakaway scenarios requiring sustained power and tactical timing
Capable of outsprinting breakaway companions and holding off reduced peloton pursuits
form_trajectory: positive: successfully secured green jersey mathematically mid-Tour, demonstrating consistency and tactical intelligence across sprint competitions
